hooks.command: file="$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null)"; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.swift$'; then swiftc -typecheck "$file" -sdk $(xcrun --show-sdk-path --sdk iphonesimulator) 2>&1 | head -20; fi

file="$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null)"; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.swift$'; then grep -n 'UserDefaults.*api_key\|UserDefaults.*secret' "$file" && echo 'SECURITY WARNING: API key/secret stored in UserDefaults — use Keychain instead' || true; fi
